name: albitor-plugins
description: Albitor's catalogue of Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: gds
plugins.description: Build and audit GOV.UK-compliant services: GOV.UK Design System components, patterns and styles, plus WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility and the public sector accessibility regulations.

plugins.name: shadcn
plugins.description: Build, audit, and preview modern web apps with shadcn/ui components on Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS, meeting WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility. The default design system for net-new SME and startup web apps.

plugins.name: mui
plugins.description: Build, audit, and preview Material Design interfaces across frameworks: the shared Material foundations (colour, type, spacing, elevation, theming) with a framework-appropriate component layer — SMUI on SvelteKit, @mui/material on React — plus WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility for consumer and general-purpose web apps.

plugins.name: carbon
plugins.description: Build and audit enterprise, data-heavy B2B interfaces with the IBM Carbon Design System: Carbon components (React and Web Components), patterns, IBM Design Language styles and tokens, plus WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility and an axe-based conformance baseline.

plugins.name: auth
plugins.description: The default auth pack: end-user sign-up and login for a delivered app, backed by an Amazon Cognito user pool with a public app client, in-app UI (styled by the app's chosen design system, not the Cognito Hosted UI), and JWT-validated API middleware. Self-sign-up is on by default.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Author an app's documentation to a consistent standard with three authoritative frameworks: Diátaxis (the four documentation modes), the C4 model (software architecture diagrams), and arc42 (the 12-section architecture template). The first-party required-documentation capability skills.
